title: Paw Patrol Push Pop It Sensory Fidget Toy Stress Relief for Kids Keychain - Pink
description:
These silicone Paw Patrol-themed pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys help to relieve stress and anxiety in kids of all ages. Popping the bubbles on the pop it toy aids with focus and attention by allowing the brain to filter extraneous sensory information in a child’s current environment, whether it be at school, doing homework or falling asleep. The pop it toys can be played as a game between friends and family, making it a fun and multipurpose toy for kids of all ages! The Paw Patrol push pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys comes with a handy built-in keychain, so kids and little ones can attach the pop to lunch bags, backpacks, sports bags, and more to keep it safe and secure to prevent the sensory toy from getting lost

Paw Patrol Push Pop It Sensory Fidget Toy Stress Relief for Kids Keychain - Pink

These silicone Paw Patrol-themed pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys help to relieve stress and anxiety in kids of all ages. Popping the bubbles on the pop it toy aids with focus and attention by allowing the brain to filter extraneous sensory information in a child’s current environment, whether it be at school, doing homework or falling asleep. The pop it toys can be played as a game between friends and family, making it a fun and multipurpose toy for kids of all ages!

Key Features

  • STRESS RELIEF POP IT FIDGET TOY: These Paw Patrol themed pop it fidget toys or sensory toys help to relieve stress and anxiety in kids of all ages; popping the bubbles on the pop it toy aids with focus and attention by allowing the brain to filter extraneous sensory information in their current environment; the pop it toy can be played as game between friends and family!
  • KEEP SECURE WITH HANDY KEYCHAIN: The Paw Patrol push pop it fidget toys or sensory toys comes with a handy built in keychain, so kids and little ones can attach the pop it to lunch bags, backpacks, sports bags and more, to keep it safe and secure and to prevent the sensory toy from getting lost
  • SAFE AND DURABLE SILICONE MATERIAL: Made from silicone, the bubble popping sensory toys are soft to touch, odorless and non-toxic; easy to clean, they don’t harbor bacteria and can easily be disinfected regularly without harm to the silicone material; the silicone material makes the pop it toy long lasting, standing up to lots of presses and pops!
  • POP IT GAME PLAYING INSTRUCTIONS: Each player takes turn by pressing down any number of bubbles they wish in a single row, while the second player starts by pressing the connected bubbles; the player who presses down the last one loses; then flip the pop it fidget toy sensory toy and start again!
  • SPECIFICIATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 4.5 x .5 inches; Colors: Blue or Pink; Material: Silicone

Product Specifications

  • MPN: PPFTPNK1
  • UPC: 678634014344
  • Color: Pink
  • Size: 4.5 in

The Paw Patrol push pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys comes with a handy built-in keychain, so kids and little ones can attach the pop to lunch bags, backpacks, sports bags, and more to keep it safe and secure to prevent the sensory toy from getting lost. And, made from silicone, the pop it sensory toys are soft to touch, odorless, and non-toxic; easy to clean, they don’t harbor bacteria and can easily be disinfected regularly without harm to the silicone material; the silicon material is incredibly long-lasting, standing up to lots of presses and pops!

POP IT GAME PLAYING INSTRUCTIONS: Each player takes a turn by pressing down any number of bubbles they wish in a single row, while the second player starts by pressing the connected bubbles; the player who presses down the last one loses; then flip the pop it fidget toy sensory toy and start again!
